headline: Phillips 66 Flags $900 Million Derivatives Loss As Oil Surges 68%
summary: Refiner cites losses from net-short commodity positions as Iran conflict drives crude and diesel prices sharply higher.

raw.headline: Phillips 66 Flags $900 Million Derivatives Loss As Oil Surges 68%
raw.summary: Refiner cites losses from net-short commodity positions as Iran conflict drives crude and diesel prices sharply higher.

headline: Gas prices should soon start slowly easing if ceasefire holds, analysts say
summary: With oil prices plunging after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, gas prices at the pump might soon follow, at least for now.

raw.headline: Gas prices should soon start slowly easing if ceasefire holds, analysts say
raw.summary: With oil prices plunging after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire, gas prices at the pump might soon follow, at least for now.

headline: Delta Soars 13% Despite a Fuel Bill That Ballooned by $2 Billion
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) shares are up 13% in early trading Wednesday morning, recovering sharply after yesterday’s close of $65.62. The move comes despite a headline GAAP net loss and a fuel bill that would make most airline executives lose sleep. Here’s why investors are cheering anyway. The paradox is real: Delta Air Lines posted ... Delta Soars 13% Despite a Fuel Bill That Ballooned by $2 Billion

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $177
summary: Barclays  analyst Theresa Chen   maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $158 to $177.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $177
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Ryan Todd   maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $168 to $177.

headline: Shares of oil and gas companies are trading lower after President Trump posted on social media that the U.S. will work closely with Iran and that many of the 15 points in the proposed plan to end the war have been agreed to, signaling a de-escalation in the Middle East conflict and related supply chain constraints.

headline: Delta CEO says airline will 'meaningfully' cut growth plans, sees $300 million boost from its refinery
summary: Delta is scaling back its flight plans as fuel costs grow to reduce its expenses.

raw.headline: Delta CEO says airline will 'meaningfully' cut growth plans, sees $300 million boost from its refinery
raw.summary: Delta is scaling back its flight plans as fuel costs grow to reduce its expenses.
